title: Records for "A Scoping Review of Bias in Large AI Models for Medicine and Healthcare
author: Anonymous
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Description 
 This dataset contains the supporting data and supplementary materials for the manuscript *A Scoping Review of Bias in Large AI Models for Medicine and Healthcare*. 
 The repository documents the study selection process, inter-rater screening results, data extraction framework, final extracted study-level data, PRISMA-ScR reporting checklist, and figure files used in the revised manuscript. No new clinical, patient-level, or experimental datasets were generated. Full-text PDFs of third-party published articles or preprints are not included. 
 Repository contents 
 **README.md**   Provides an overview of the repository structure, file contents, data availability statement, code availability statement, citation note, and license information. 
 1-PRISMA-ScR-CheckList/PRISMA-ScR-Fillable-Checklist-MedBias.pdf 
  Completed PRISMA-ScR checklist for the scoping review. 
 2-DataExtraction/MedBias-Data-Extraction.csv 
  Final structured data extraction table for all included studies. It contains study metadata, model names, medical scenarios, clinical specialties, health conditions, experimental datasets, evaluation approaches, mitigation approaches, sensitive attributes, bias manifestations, metrics, main findings, mitigation effects, limitations, and extractor notes. 
 2-DataExtraction/MedBias-Data-Extraction-Codebook-Final.md 
  Codebook defining the data extraction fields, controlled categories, open-text fields, and coding rules used to construct the final data extraction table. 
 2-DataExtraction/MedBias-Data-Extraction-Template.csv 
  Blank data extraction template corresponding to the finalized codebook. 
 3-Figures/Figure-1-SurveyScope.pdf 
  Figure file illustrating the scope of the scoping review. 
   
 3-Figures/Figure-2-PRISMA-ScR-Flow.pdf 
  PRISMA-ScR flow diagram summarizing record identification, screening, eligibility assessment, and final inclusion. 
 3-Figures/Figure-3-BiasCauses.pdf 
  Figure file summarizing sources and mechanisms of medical bias in large AI models. 
 3-Figures/Figure-4-Distribution.pdf 
  Figure file summarizing the distribution of included studies across clinical specialties, medical scenarios, sensitive attributes, and publication venues. 
 4-Inter-Rater-Agreement/manual_screening_result.csv   
  Screening labels from two independent reviewers, used to calculate agreement rate and Cohen’s kappa for study selection. 
 Bibliographic information, DOIs, URLs, and extracted study-level information for the included sources are provided in **MedBias-Data-Extraction.csv**. 
 No custom software or reusable analysis package was developed for this scoping review. The analyses were based on manual screening, structured data extraction, inter-rater agreement assessment, and descriptive synthesis.
